caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" and "MAN" visible, a black baseball cap with a gold logo, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone. He wears a gold chain and a gold watch. He is in a studio setting with a white background featuring gold stars and the repeated text "GRIND HUSTLE." To his side, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101" with a smaller caption below. In the bottom corners of the screen, a circular logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." Throughout the sequence, the man shifts his posture and facial expression. He begins by looking forward, then brings his hand up to his chin while speaking, and eventually turns his head slightly to the side while adjusting his headphones, ending with a smile.
